name: Spam Salad Cones
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix all ingredients except tortillas and lettuce.
2. Cover; refrigerate until ready to serve.
3. Roll each tortilla into a large cone and secure with a toothpick.
4. Carefully stuff each cone with a crumpled piece of foil so the cone will retain its shape. Place cones on a baking sheet; broil 3 inches from heat, turning several times, until cones are crisp and lightly browned, about 3 minutes.
5. Cool; carefully remove foil and wooden picks.
6. When ready to serve, line each cone with a lettuce leaf and fill with salad mixture.
